notes: Refers to the act or process of repairing something. Often used with 'durchführen' (to carry out) or 'machen' (to do).

sentences.german: Die Reparatur des Autos hat drei Tage gedauert.
sentences.english: The repair of the car took three days.

sentences.german: Die Reparaturen an dem alten Haus waren sehr teuer.
sentences.english: The repairs on the old house were very expensive.
